sentences.target: Wir bauen heute ein Regal aus Holz.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈbaʊ̯ən ˈhɔʏ̯tə aɪ̯n ʁeˈɡaːl aʊ̯s hɔlts/

translations.de: Wir bauen heute ein Regal aus Holz.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈbaʊ̯ən ˈhɔʏ̯tə aɪ̯n ʁeˈɡaːl aʊ̯s hɔlts/
translations.en: We are building a shelf today.
translations.es: Hoy vamos a montar una estantería de madera.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, on monte une étagère en bois.
translations.it: Oggi montiamo uno scaffale di legno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天在组装一个木质的书架。
translations.yue: 我哋今日砌一個木書架。
translations.pt: Hoje estamos montando uma prateleira de madeira.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi lắp một chiếc kệ gỗ.
translations.nl: Vandaag zetten we een houten rek in elkaar.
translations.hi: आज हम लकड़ी की शेल्फ बना रहे हैं.
translations.nb: I dag skrur vi sammen en hylle av tre.
translations.id: Hari ini kami merakit rak kayu.
translations.sv: I dag sätter vi ihop en trähylla.
translations.ro: Astăzi asamblăm un raft din lemn.
translations.da: I dag samler vi en træhylde.
translations.ja: 今日は木の棚を組み立てます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb in present tense, 1st person plural; agrees with 'Wir'.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the event.
Indefinite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Regal'.
Common noun, neuter accusative singular; direct object of 'bauen'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a PP expressing material ('aus Holz').
Common noun, neuter dative singular; object of the preposition 'aus' (material specification of 'Regal').

sentences.target: Die Kinder bauen zusammen eine Sandburg.

translations.de: Die Kinder bauen zusammen eine Sandburg.
translations.en: The children are building a sandcastle together.
translations.es: Los niños están construyendo juntos un castillo de arena.
translations.fr: Les enfants construisent ensemble un château de sable.
translations.it: I bambini stanno costruendo insieme un castello di sabbia.
translations.pt: As crianças estão construindo juntas um castelo de areia.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ đang cùng nhau xây lâu đài cát.
translations.ar: الأطفال يبنون قلعة من الرمل معًا.
translations.nl: De kinderen bouwen samen een zandkasteel.
translations.uk: Діти разом будують замок з піску.
translations.hi: बच्चे मिलकर रेत का किला बना रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Dzieci razem budują zamek z piasku.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά φτιάχνουν μαζί ένα κάστρο από άμμο.
translations.id: Anak-anak sedang bersama-sama membangun istana pasir.
translations.ro: Copiii construiesc împreună un castel de nisip.
translations.cs: Děti spolu staví hrad z písku.
translations.ja: 子どもたちが一緒に砂の城を作っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of 'Kinder'.
Common noun, plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb in present tense, 3rd person plural; agrees with 'Kinder'.
Adverb of manner; modifies 'bauen' to indicate collaborative action.
Indefinite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Sandburg'.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'bauen'.

sentences.target: Sie bauen im Garten ein kleines Haus.
sentences.reading: /ziː ˈbaʊ̯ən ɪm ˈɡaʁtən aɪ̯n ˈklaɪ̯nəs haʊ̯s/

translations.de: Sie bauen im Garten ein kleines Haus.
translations.ipa: /ziː ˈbaʊ̯ən ɪm ˈɡaʁtən aɪ̯n ˈklaɪ̯nəs haʊ̯s/
translations.en: They are building a small house in the garden.
translations.es: Están construyendo una casita en el jardín.
translations.fr: Ils construisent une petite maison dans le jardin.
translations.it: Stanno costruendo una casetta in giardino.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们在花园里建一座小房子。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺花園度起緊一間細屋。
translations.ru: Они строят в саду небольшой домик.
translations.pt: Eles estão construindo uma casinha no jardim.
translations.vi: Họ đang xây một ngôi nhà nhỏ trong vườn.
translations.ar: هم يبنون بيتًا صغيرًا في الحديقة.
translations.nl: Ze bouwen een klein huisje in de tuin.
translations.uk: Вони будують у саду маленький будиночок.
translations.hu: A kertben egy kis házat építenek.
translations.hi: वे बगीचे में एक छोटा सा घर बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Φτιάχνουν ένα μικρό σπιτάκι στον κήπο.
translations.nb: De bygger et lite hus i hagen.
translations.id: Mereka sedang membangun sebuah rumah kecil di kebun.
translations.sv: De bygger ett litet hus i trädgården.
translations.ro: Ei construiesc o căsuță în grădină.
translations.da: De bygger et lille hus i haven.
translations.ja: 庭に小さな家を作っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb in present tense, 3rd person plural; agrees with 'Sie'.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; object of the preposition 'im'.
Indefinite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Haus'.
Attributive adjective, accusative neuter singular; modifies 'Haus' and agrees in gender/number/case.
Common noun, neuter accusative singular; direct object of 'bauen'.

sentences.target: In der Schule bauen wir ein Boot.
sentences.reading: /ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə ˈbaʊ̯ən viːɐ̯ aɪ̯n boːt/

translations.de: In der Schule bauen wir ein Boot.
translations.ipa: /ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə ˈbaʊ̯ən viːɐ̯ aɪ̯n boːt/
translations.en: At school, we are building a boat.
translations.es: En la escuela estamos construyendo un barco.
translations.fr: À l’école, on construit un bateau.
translations.it: A scuola stiamo costruendo una barca.
translations.pt: Na escola estamos construindo um barco.
translations.vi: Ở trường chúng tôi đang làm một chiếc thuyền.
translations.nl: Op school bouwen we een boot.
translations.hi: स्कूल में हम एक नाव बना रहे हैं.
translations.nb: På skolen bygger vi en båt.
translations.id: Di sekolah kami membuat sebuah perahu.
translations.sv: I skolan bygger vi en båt.
translations.da: I skolen bygger vi en båd.
translations.ja: 学校で船を作っています。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing dative; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Schule'.
Common noun, feminine dative singular; object of the preposition 'In'.
Finite main verb in present tense, 1st person plural; part of V2 word order.
Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Indefinite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Boot'.
Common noun, neuter accusative singular; direct object of 'bauen'.
